headline: Woman's 'I Don't Need Therapy' T-Shirt Is Why Her Friends Started A 'Jenna Needs Therapy' Group Chat
summary: The group chat has 47 members. Jenna is not in it. 'I'm fine,' Jenna said. 'She's not,' the chat agreed.
fullBody: Jenna Denial bought an 'I don't need therapy' shirt. Her friends bought a 'Jenna Needs Therapy' group chat. 'It's ironic,' one friend said. Jenna has cried in 4 different parking lots this week. 'I'm just emotional,' Jenna said. The chat has a bingo card. 'Parking lot cry' was checked off Tuesday. Jenna is now 'taking a break from friends.' The chat has renamed itself 'Jenna's Break Support Group.'
